pageDescription: Manage task queues, scheduled tasks, and published API services

queued.emptyDescription: Tell the Agent "help me schedule a task" in a conversation to add tasks to the queue
queued.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
queued.confirmBatchCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel {{count}} tasks?
queued.confirmBatchDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} tasks?

scheduled.emptyDescription: Tell the Agent "run... every day at 9am" in a conversation to create scheduled tasks
scheduled.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this scheduled task?

services.emptyDescription: Publish a workflow as an API service from the workflow detail page's "Publish" tab

form.additionalInfoPlaceholder: e.g. Query threat intelligence for threatbook.cn and generate a report
form.workflowParamsInvalid: Workflow params must be a valid JSON object

taskSheet.extractTimeout: Extraction timed out. Please have Rex output JSON-formatted configuration in the conversation and try again.
taskSheet.selfContainedHint: Scheduled tasks run in a fresh Rex session and no longer inherit a parent session. Put all required context directly into the description or additional info.

create.guidePanelDesc: Choose a guide or case. Rex will confirm task goal, executor, schedule, and output requirements, then organize them into a creatable task configuration.

guideActions.label: Create Scheduled Task
guideActions.description: Start with goal, executor, frequency, timezone, and output requirements.
guideActions.prompt: Please guide me through creating a Flocks scheduled task. Do not output final JSON immediately. Use the question tool to ask one most important question at a time and help me confirm the task goal, execution mode (Agent or Workflow), concrete execution instructions, schedule mode (now, one-time, or recurring), timezone, priority, and output requirements. After I confirm, summarize the task configuration so it can be extracted into the form.

guideActions.label: Clarify Instructions
guideActions.description: Turn a fuzzy need into an Agent-ready userPrompt.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me clarify the execution instructions for this task. Ask one question at a time to confirm task goal, input source, processing steps, output format, failure handling, and which context must be written into the task description. Finally, organize it into text suitable for the task additional info field.

guideActions.label: Choose Schedule
guideActions.description: Confirm one-time, daily, weekly, weekdays, or custom cron.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me choose the schedule for this task. First confirm business timezone, whether it should run now or at a specific time, whether it is recurring, execution windows, and weekend/holiday rules. After confirmation, provide scheduleKind, runAt or cron, timezone, and cronDescription.

guideActions.label: Choose Executor
guideActions.description: Decide whether an Agent or existing Workflow should run it.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me decide whether this task should be executed by an Agent or a Workflow. First confirm whether the task needs a fixed process, structured input, repeatable nodes, and stable output. If Agent fits, recommend agentName and userPrompt. If Workflow fits, confirm workflowID and context JSON.

caseActions.label: Daily Security Brief
caseActions.description: Collect security data at a fixed time and generate a daily brief.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create a daily security brief scheduled task that runs every morning at 9:00, summarizes security alerts from the past 24 hours, key asset risks, and response recommendations, and outputs a Markdown report. Please guide me through Agent/Workflow choice, data sources, output format, timezone, and failure handling.

caseActions.label: IOC Recheck
caseActions.description: Periodically check IOC reputation changes and summarize deltas.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create an IOC recheck task that checks a batch of IPs, domains, URLs, or hashes every day for threat intelligence changes, then outputs newly added risks and response recommendations. Please guide me through input source, Agent or Workflow execution, schedule, output format, and alert thresholds.

caseActions.label: Weekly Asset Review
caseActions.description: Check asset status, exposure, and unusual changes every week.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create a weekly asset review task that checks key assets for exposure, risk status, and unusual changes, then generates a review summary. Please guide me through review scope, executor, frequency, Workflow params or Agent instructions, and report format.

edit.guidePanelDesc: Choose an editing entry. Rex will use the current task configuration to guide instruction, schedule, executor, and output changes.

guideActions.label: Improve Current Task
guideActions.description: Diagnose current configuration, then confirm fields to change.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me edit the current task "{{name}}". Start with a short diagnosis based on the current configuration and do not modify it directly. Then use the question tool to ask one most important question at a time to confirm execution instructions, schedule, executor, priority, and output requirements. After confirmation, output a JSON configuration summary that can be extracted into the form.

guideActions.label: Adjust Schedule
guideActions.description: Change execution time, recurrence, timezone, or display label.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me adjust the schedule of the current task "{{name}}". Confirm timezone, recurrence, whether it should be one-time, time windows to avoid, and how cronDescription should be displayed. After confirmation, summarize extractable schedule fields.

guideActions.label: Rewrite Instructions
guideActions.description: Give the Agent or Workflow fuller execution context.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me rewrite the additional info for the current task "{{name}}". First check whether the current instruction explains goal, input, steps, output format, and failure handling, then confirm missing information step by step. After confirmation, organize it into a clearer userPrompt.

caseActions.label: Reduce Frequency
caseActions.description: Lower execution pressure with a better recurrence.
caseActions.prompt: I want to reduce the execution frequency of the current task "{{name}}" because it runs too often. Please recommend a new cron, timezone, and display description based on the task goal, and explain the impact.

caseActions.label: Switch to Workflow
caseActions.description: Move from free-form Agent instructions to a fixed Workflow.
caseActions.prompt: I want to evaluate whether the current task "{{name}}" should be switched to Workflow execution. Please help me confirm fixed process, input parameters, workflowID, context JSON, and output requirements, then summarize extractable configuration.
